pr.title: Add user lookup by name
pr.body: Adds GetUser to fetch a user row by name.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+func GetUser(db *sql.DB, name string) (*User, error) {
+	query := "SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE name = '" + name + "'"
+	row := db.QueryRow(query)
+	var u User
+	_ = row.Scan(&u.ID, &u.Name)
+	return &u, nil
+}
